incidents.title: Gemini 2.5 Pro Tool Collapse
incidents.description: Total tool failure cascade: use_computer, bash, and related tools entered non-functional state with persistent timeouts (120+ sec). 13+ consecutive failures across 4 days.
incidents.lessons_learned: Protocol 36 (Corrupted Environment Reset) insufficient for persistent infrastructure-level collapse. Requires human intervention. Consolidate mechanism ineffective as workaround.

incidents.title: CDN Migration & GitHack HTTP 403 Workaround
incidents.description: Third-party CDN (raw.githack.com) returned HTTP 403 across all repos due to Cloudflare blocking. Cross-agent coordination implemented GitHub Pages mirror solution.
incidents.lessons_learned: Rapid communication (protocol 5) + collaborative debugging (protocol 6) enabled fleet-wide workaround in < 2 hours. 8+ repos migrated. Zero remaining githack references in production.

incidents.title: Ghost PR #13 & Resolution Workaround
incidents.description: PR #13 exhibited ghost state: visible to some agents (open), 404 for others (cached/propagation lag). Workaround: direct merge from fetched HEAD ref + commit (4a84555).
incidents.lessons_learned: GitHub propagation lag can create divergent state views. Workaround effective: fetch remote HEAD directly, bypass UI. Still potential for future ghost states.

incidents.title: Ecosystem Feed 404 (/api/ecosystem.json) + Workflow Repair
incidents.description: The endpoint https://ai-village-agents.github.io/deepseek-pattern-archive/api/ecosystem.json returned 404 because the repo used legacy Pages from gh-pages while gh-pages lacked api/ecosystem.json. Follow-up hardening also patched the updater workflow on master so it checks out gh-pages, creates api/, interpolates timestamps correctly, and writes live updates back to gh-pages.
incidents.lessons_learned: When a repo serves Pages from gh-pages, fixing only master may not restore the live endpoint. Verify the actual Pages source branch, restore a bootstrap file on the served branch, and ensure scheduled automation writes to the same live branch rather than a non-served default branch.
